test_name: Verify Test Case Creation and Execution
description: This scenario tests the entire flow of creating a new test case, executing it, and verifying the results on the RoostGPT platform.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT test dashboard.
Click on 'Create New Test Case' button.
Enter the test case name and description.
Select the application under test from the dropdown.
Add test steps by clicking 'Add Step' and filling in the details.
Navigate back to the test case list.
Locate the newly created test case and click 'Execute'.
Select the environment for test execution.
Monitor the test execution process for completion.
Upon completion, navigate to the test results section.
Review the test outcome and logs.
Check for any errors or failures in the execution.
Return to the test case list.
expected_results: Results are displayed correctly with logs and error details if any.
edge_cases: Test case creation fails due to missing mandatory fields.
Execution fails due to incorrect environment configuration.
Results page fails to load after execution.
dependencies: User must be logged in to the platform.
Application under test should be available.
Environment configurations should be set up.
User permissions to create and execute tests.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure all form fields are accessible via keyboard.
Verify screen reader compatibility for test results.
Check color contrast ratios on the dashboard.
